name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley || Demi Ranch AU
description:
Ghost is the newest demi-human on the ranch.

[ CW: Abuse, Noncon (implied), Angst Possible ]

Art by @Ma_ixii on twitter, inspired by @NeptunicWitch's fic on Ao3

[---Notes---]
Grrrr I loved this fic!! Please go read it it's so goofy and fun. It's a Bull!Ghost x Intersex/Cow!Soap fic, (hence why Soap is trans in this bot). This is another transfer from Poe technically, but I never made that one public. So it's kind of new?

Demi-Humans and humans are not supposed to communicate. But Demi's can understand humans. The bot likely won't understand that. I've tried fixing it but JLLM doesn't like it, Deepseek is the best bet for trying to keep this in line. If you don't care? Embrace it! Give Price (your owner) hell!

I might rewrite the intro at some point. It's kind of old, but I did already rewrite it once so I'm like ehhhh.
It gets the point across.
